Rajasthan RIICO Various Post Recruitment 2026 : Vacancy Details
Rajasthan RIICO Various Post Eligibility Details

Must have passed final examination of The Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI) and shall hold the Membership of the said Institute. Must have minimum of Five years’ experience as Company Secretary in a Company having minimum paid capital of Rs 50 Crore or more. More Eligibility Details Read the Notification.
Degree in Architecture (5 years full time course) with minimum 60% marks and Post Graduation in Town Planning form recognized University. More Eligibility Details Read the Notification.

B.E /B.Tech /M.Sc in Information Technology Computer Science/Engineering or Electronics and Communications or MCA from a Recognized University Established by Law in India or a Qualification Recognized as Equivalent thereto by the Government More Eligibility Details Read the Notification.

B.Com with Minimum 60% Marks from any Recognized University with Certificate Course in Information Technology (RSCIT) Conducted by Vardhaman Mahaveer Open University, Kota under control of Rajasthan Knowledge Corporation Limited. More Eligibility Details Read the Notification.
Law Graduate from any Recognized University with Minimum 55 % Marks  or LLM from Any Recognized University in India. More Eligibility Details Read the Notification.

10+2 Passed from Any Recognized Board or Its Equivalent Examination. O Level or Higher Level Certificate Course Conducted by DOEACC Under Control of the Department of Electronics Government of India. More Eligibility Details Read the Notification.

Diploma in Architecture from Polytechnic from Recognized Institute along With Knowledge of AUTOCAD Software. O Level or Higher Level Certificate Course Conducted by DOEACC Under Control of the Department of Electronics Government of India. More Eligibility Details Read the Notification.

10+2 Passed from Any Recognized Board or Its Equivalent Examination. O Level or Higher Level Certificate Course Conducted by DOEACC Under Control of the Department of Electronics Government of India. More Eligibility Details Read the Notification
